summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Process AI website - both backend APIs and frontend UI are working correctly with successful integration

minor_issues.issue: Console shows 401 errors on initial page load
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact, but creates console noise
minor_issues.details: API calls made before authentication result in 401 responses in browser console

passed_tests: Health API endpoint returns healthy status
Admin login with correct credentials works
Admin dashboard loads and displays data
Homepage loads with hero, services, and projects sections
Navigation links work (Services, Projects anchor links)
Book a Call button navigates to /booking
Admin can view bookings tab with submitted data
All admin dashboard tabs function correctly
Authentication flow works with JWT cookies
